description: SCOR Exposure Domain. Controlled vocabulary that classifies how an event reaches the platform, orthogonal to the five SCOR layers (PCE, SEG, SVC, AST, AN). Five domains: Kinetic, Non-kinetic, Electronic Warfare (EW), Cyber Warfare, and Other (environmental). Analysts apply one or more domain tags to any MISP event or to entries in the SCOR Incidents galaxy to filter by attack mode. Contact: william.o.ferguson@ethicallyhacking.space. License: CC BY 4.0. Namespace_display: SCOR. Namespace_long: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience. Steward: H4CK32N4U75®.
name: SCOR Exposure Domain
